spec.name: On The Drawbridge
spec.description: You have arrived at the drawbridge leading into the Castle. Before you is a huge, double-doored gate. It seems very strong. You see some whirls in the moat.

north.description: The gate has huge, but intricately carved hinges. As the Castle itself, it seems designed not only for strength, but also for beauty.

extra_descs.description: You can't see much, but it seems that something beneath the surface is creating them.
